pageContext.name: Spoiled Apple
pageContext.description: There's something spoiled rotten in the state of Sideshow…  Sideshow presents the Spoiled Apple Replica, facing off against your horror collectibles. Rosy, red-cheeked apples have long been used in Sideshow photography to give a sense of scale next to our highly detailed statues and figures. But now fame has turned this apple into a gruesome visage of its former self.  Measuring 3.56' tall, the Spoiled Apple is skinned on one side, with two lopsided eyes above a lipless mouth of yellowing teeth. Its beady, lidless gaze bores deep into the beholder's soul. Finally, the fresh, festering cuts and a black stem show that this apple has shuffled off its flesh to reflect the madness within.  Spoil yourself when you add the Spoiled Apple Replica to your horror collection today!
